nasb.text: Thus the Lord said to me, “Go and stand in the public gate, through which the kings of Judah come in and go out, as well as in all the gates of Jerusalem;

esv.text: Thus said the Lord to me: “Go and stand in the People’s Gate, by which the kings of Judah enter and by which they go out, and in all the gates of Jerusalem,

cnv.text: 耶和華對我這樣說：“你去站在猶大列王出入的城門，又站在耶路撒冷的各城門口，

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说：“你去站在犹大君王出入的城门前和耶路撒冷的各城门前，
